name: jolopez-product-plugins
description: Jo Lopez's public Claude Code plugin marketplace. Currently hosts the MB Smart Product Wiki plugin. Proprietary, not for redistribution.

plugins.name: mb-smart-product-wiki
plugins.description: Ministry Brands Smart Product Wiki. Three skills for product teams: Knowledgebase Maker, Knowledgebase Assistant, and Persona Maker. Plain language throughout, never proceeds on assumptions about content it cannot access.
